display.text:
model: gemma-4-26b
task: generate_mujoco_xml

instructions: |
  Generate a valid MuJoCo XML model of a simple ideal pendulum using SI units.

  Coordinate system:
    +x = right
    +y = upward
    +z = out of page

  Pendulum definition:
    - Massless rod
    - Spherical bob
    - Single hinge joint

  Joint specifications:
    - Type: hinge
    - Location: [0, 1, 0]
    - Axis: [0, 0, 1]
    - Damping: 0
    - Friction: 0
    - No losses

  Rod:
    - Length: 0.2485 m
    - Mass: 0
    - Collision: disabled

  Bob:
    - Shape: sphere
    - Diameter: 0.1 m
    - Mass: 1.0 kg

  Environment:
    - Gravity: [0, -9.81, 0]

  Initial conditions:
    - Pendulum starts horizontal
    - Bob positioned along +x from hinge
    - Initial angle: +90 degrees from vertical
    - Initial angular velocity: 0 rad/s

  MuJoCo requirements:
    - Enable energy computation
    - Exactly one hinge joint
    - Joint rotates only about z-axis
    - Use SI units

  Acceptance criteria:
    - Exactly one hinge joint
    - Rod length = 0.2485 m
    - Rod mass = 0 kg
    - Bob mass = 1 kg
    - Gravity = [0, -9.81, 0]
    - Initial angle = +90 degrees
    - Initial angular velocity = 0
    - Energy computation enabled

output_format:
  type: xml
  constraints:
    - Return only valid MuJoCo XML
    - No explanations
    - No additional text

state.title: YAML_creation/Temperature_Testing/V6_Temp_0.0/test09/ChatGPT-5.3-Instant_Pend.YAML

input.content:
<mujoco>
  <option gravity="0 -9.81 0" integrator="Euler" />

  <worldbody>
    <light diffuse=".5 .5 .5" pos="0 0 -3" dir="0 0 1"/>
    
    <body name="pendulum" pos="0 1 0">
      <joint name="hinge" type="hinge" axis="0 0 1" damping="0" friction="0"/>
      <!-- Rod -->
      <body name="rod" pos="0 0 0">
        <!-- Since the rod is massless, we represent its length by the position of the bob -->
        <body name="bob" pos="0.2485 0 0">
          <geom type="sphere" size="0.05" mass="1" contype="1" conaffinity="1"/>
        </body>
      </body>
    </body>
  </worldbody>
</mujoco>

<mujoco model="pendulum">
  <option gravity="0 -9.81 0" />

  <worldbody>
    <light diffuse=".5 .5 .5" pos="0 2 -3" dir="0 0 1"/>
    <body name="hinge_body" pos="0 1 0">
      <joint name="hinge_joint" type="hinge" axis="0 0 1" damping="0" friction="0"/>
      <body name="bob" pos="0.2485 0 0">
        <geom type="sphere" size="0.05" mass="1"/>
      </body>
    </body>
  </worldbody>
</mujoco>

  <worldbody>

      </body>
    </body>
  </worldbody>
</mujoco>
